content: Anybody know much about the Nouveau drivers? I am surprised to see the idea of rewriting them in Rust even come up, I thought they were pretty far along https://lwn.net/SubscriberLink/953144/b85b695d0c760692/
Maybe it would be a good idea to keep a list of potential projects somewhere

recent changes in how NVIDIA exposes the hardware have made it an opportune time to rewrite the driver, and the new interface not having much stability (making it like asahi a bit) meant using rust might be a good plan.
@Danilo Krummrich is this what you are working on? Awesome if so
@Trevor Gross yes, it is. :smile:
Wow, awesome! Do you have a link or is it still too early for that?

Both, hence be warned. :wink:

https://gitlab.freedesktop.org/dakr/nova
Quite alright! I just keep an informal list of what sort of projects and patches are going on https://github.com/tgross35/RFL-patch-registry
